input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /git/project/hooks/post-receive
#!/bin/bash

while read oldrev newrev ref; do
  if [[ $ref == refs/heads/main ]]; then
    git --work-tree=/var/www/main --git-dir=/git/project checkout -f main
  elif [[ $ref == refs/heads/dev ]]; then
    git --work-tree=/var/www/dev --git-dir=/git/project checkout -f dev
  fi
done
EOF
chmod +x /git/project/hooks/post-receive
chown git:git /git/project/hooks/post-receive

#!/bin/bash

while read oldrev newrev ref; do
  if [[ $ref == refs/heads/main ]]; then

  elif [[ $ref == refs/heads/dev ]]; then
    git --work-tree=/var/www/dev --git-dir=/git/project checkout -f dev
  fi
done

input.content:
#!/bin/bash

while read oldrev newrev ref; do
  if [[ "$ref" == "refs/heads/main" ]]; then
    GIT_WORK_TREE=/var/www/main GIT_INDEX_FILE=/git/project/index.main git checkout -f main
  elif [[ "$ref" == "refs/heads/dev" ]]; then
    GIT_WORK_TREE=/var/www/dev GIT_INDEX_FILE=/git/project/index.dev git checkout -f dev
  fi
done
